\tzpentry{ID4223}{Irrotational Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4223 introduces Irrotational Magnetic Field Curl Field Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \vec{B}_{\text{irrotational}} &= -\nabla\Phi_M, \quad \nabla^2\Phi_M = \nabla \cdot \vec{M} \\ \vec{B}_{\text{solenoidal}} &= \nabla \times \vec{A}, \quad \nabla^2\vec{A} = -\mu_0\nabla \times \vec{M} \\ \vec{B}_{\text{harmonic}} &: \nabla \cdot \vec{B}_{\text{harmonic}} = 0, \nabla \times \vec{B}_{\text{harmonic}} = 0 \end{align}
